summary.rationale: The new song enters the existing editorial songs workspace without changing the established list-detail layout, and the modulation structure remains legible through section naming and chart notes.

notes: The list remains scanable with the new chart added.
The selected viewer preserves the existing rhythm of metadata, notes, and section blocks.
No new UI chrome or layout regressions were introduced for this content-only seed.

next_steps: Replace the manual song seed with a formal lead-sheet publish flow when web-sourced chart ingestion is available.
